meaning: n.动植物,繁殖,(声波,电磁辐射等)传播
examples: There is no identity propagation in this scenario.
These two countries must work together toward the propagation of true Buddhism.
Its conservation is key to the sustainable propagation of Antarctic species.
Some authors further distinguish between propagation (local replication) and migration (getting from one system to another).
Aubergines sit on small piles of sand, surrounded by instructions for their care and propagation.
